name: The 'log_connections' database flag for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance is set to 'on'
query: { cloudSqlInstances( where: { engine: { eq: "postgresql" } cloudProvider: { eq: "gcp" } OR: [ { dbFlags_NONE: { name: { eq: "log_connections" } } } { dbFlags_SOME: { name: { eq: "log_connections" }, value: { eq: "off" } } } ] } ) { ...AssetFragment }}
